body.title: Register pe_plan, pe_filter, pe_probe, run_habit_chunking in tool registry
body.result: pe_chain tools registered (tags= fix + 0-arg wrappers + DB habits updated); 1670 tests pass
body.description: CRITICAL: 5 tool functions are NOT registered in the tool registry but have PROC habits that call them. pe_plan/pe_filter/pe_probe are in pe_chain.py:309-1047. run_habit_chunking is in habit_chunker.py:151. When PROC_PLAN/PROC_FILTER/PROC_PROBE/PROC_CHUNK_INSPECTOR habits fire, dispatch fails because tools not in registry.tool_name lookup. Register all 5 with proper Tool() wrappers + parameters. Test: verify registry.get(name) returns tool for each. Audit finding 2026-04-03.
